chunks.answer: Towards Fast, Specialized Machine Learning Force Fields

chunks.text: Accelerating Electronic Structure Calculations with Machine Learning (EECS-2023-222) Daniel Rothchild, Aditi Krishnapriyan and Joseph Gonzalez

chunks.answer: Accelerating Electronic Structure Calculations with Machine Learning
